meta.note: Cambridge B2 story tasks. Each = {id, title, opening (the sentence the student MUST begin with), prompt (task wording), points[]}. The 'opening' is shown as a prominent quoted band. Fill 'opening' with the exact given first line.

questions.title: Changes!
questions.opening: As soon as I woke up that morning, I knew my life was about to change.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence. Write about a change that had a big effect on you.
points: Continue directly from the given line — set the scene
Build up to the moment things changed
Reflect on how it affected you

questions.title: The Door
questions.opening: As soon as I opened the door, I knew something was wrong.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence.
points: Establish the situation the door reveals
Build the tension of what happens next

questions.title: The Decision
questions.opening: I had never had to make such a difficult decision before.
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence.
points: Set up the situation and the choice faced
Reveal the outcome and how you felt

questions.title: [Your Story Title]
questions.opening: [The exact sentence the student must begin with.]
questions.prompt: Your story must begin with this sentence.
